title: Kconfig: add comment explaining CCP16 selects for SCHC/link
description: The new selects for SCHC, ROUTING and TDMA in CCP16 config need a comment referencing the bead and why density tracking + SCHC is required for high density TDMA. P2 codereview
close_reason: Fixed with comment and selects for SCHC/link/TDMA density tracking
